message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title $update-core

actor "Integrating application user" as User
participant "Integrating application" as App
participant "<FHIR API> HPI" as HPI
participant "HPI MDM" as MDM

User -> App: Provide core details to be updated
activate App
App -> HPI: POST<Endpoint>/Practitioner/$update-core
activate HPI
HPI -> HPI: Validate[]
HPI -> MDM: Request
activate MDM
MDM --> HPI
deactivate MDM
HPI --> App: Return updated Practitioner record
deactivate HPI
App -> User: Display updated Provider details to user
deactivate App

@enduml
```
